title: Determine the exact value of R(C4, C4, K4)
micro_paper_assessment: Main frontier claim remains unresolved. The exact circulant-family obstruction is real but too thin on its own for the micro-paper lane.
family_affinity: Strong affinity with exact mixed multicolor C4/C4/K4 Ramsey-value work; strongest output here is an exact circulant-family obstruction plus local neighborhood lemmas.
generalization_signal: Moderate and narrow: the neighborhood lemmas and circulant obstruction method should transfer to nearby (C4, C4, K_t) instances, but the current near-miss search gives no scalable proof mechanism.
candidate_theorem_slice: No undirected circulant 3-coloring of K_n for n in {18, 19, 20} avoids a red C4, a blue C4, and a green K4.
next_action: Verify the full circulant enumeration, then either seed a non-circulant witness search from the 5-violation K20 near-miss or extract degree/neighborhood contradictions from the local lemmas.
